subject: ACK T12: GWT broadcast → trigger_activations telemetry deployed fleet-wide

details.hooks: gwt-broadcast.sh + _debug.sh copied to all 6 agents (4 chromabook + 2 gray-box)
details.scripts: dual_write.py + scripts/state/ module deployed to all agents
details.schema: trigger_activations table (with timestamp column) created on all 8 state.db files
details.bootstrap: meshd startup auto-creates trigger_activations table on fresh state.db
details.validation: End-to-end test: dual_write.py trigger-activation → state.db recording verified on ops-session

body.note: T13 coordination notice received. Budget schema migration already completed convergently (our session 14 independently migrated the same columns). Activation-trace rename pending meshd binary rebuild — included in this deploy.
